mapper.sql: id, user_id, role_id, scope_type, scope_id, create_time
mapper.select:
SELECT ur.id, ur.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.real_name AS realName, ur.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, r.role_code AS roleCode, ur.scope_type AS scopeType, ur.scope_id AS scopeId, ur.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_user u ON ur.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id IN
#{uid}
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY ur.create_time DESC

SELECT ur.id, ur.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.real_name AS realName, ur.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, r.role_code AS roleCode, ur.scope_type AS scopeType, ur.scope_id AS scopeId, ur.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_user u ON ur.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ur.create_time DESC
